sentences.target: Je dois prendre mon médicament après le dîner.
sentences.reading: /ʒə dwa pʁɑ̃dʁ mɔ̃ medikamɑ̃ apʁɛ lə dine/

translations.fr: Je dois prendre mon médicament après le dîner.
translations.ipa: /ʒə dwa pʁɑ̃dʁ mɔ̃ medikamɑ̃ apʁɛ lə dine/
translations.en: I have to take my medicine after dinner.
translations.es: Tengo que tomar mi medicamento después de la cena.
translations.de: Ich muss mein Medikament nach dem Abendessen einnehmen.
translations.it: Devo prendere la mia medicina dopo cena.
translations.ko: 저는 저녁 식사 후에 약을 먹어야 해요.
translations.ru: Мне нужно принять лекарство после ужина.
translations.pt: Preciso tomar meu remédio depois do jantar.
translations.he: אני צריך לקחת את התרופה שלי אחרי ארוחת הערב.
translations.tr: İlacımı akşam yemeğinden sonra almam gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Tôi phải uống thuốc sau bữa tối.
translations.ar: عليّ أن أتناول دوائي بعد العشاء.
translations.nl: Ik moet mijn medicijn na het avondeten innemen.
translations.uk: Мені потрібно прийняти ліки після вечері.
translations.hu: Vacsora után be kell vennem a gyógyszeremet.
translations.hi: मुझे रात के खाने के बाद अपनी दवा लेनी है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να πάρω το φάρμακό μου μετά το δείπνο.
translations.nb: Jeg må ta medisinen min etter middag.
translations.id: Saya harus minum obat setelah makan malam.
translations.sv: Jag måste ta min medicin efter middagen.
translations.ro: Trebuie să iau medicamentul meu după cină.
translations.cs: Musím si vzít svůj lék po večeři.
translations.da: Jeg skal tage min medicin efter aftensmaden.
translations.fi: Minun täytyy ottaa lääkkeeni illallisen jälkeen.
translations.ja: 夕食の後に薬を飲まなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the finite verb 'dois'.
Finite main verb (present, 1st sg) expressing obligation; selects the infinitive 'prendre' as its complement.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of 'dois' (modal construction).
Possessive determiner (1st person singular possessor), masculine singular; modifies 'médicament'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'prendre'.
Preposition introducing a temporal prepositional phrase ('après le dîner').
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'dîner'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'après'.

sentences.target: Tu as un médicament pour le mal de tête.
sentences.reading: /ty a œ̃ medikamɑ̃ puʁ lə mal də tɛt/

translations.fr: Tu as un médicament pour le mal de tête.
translations.ipa: /ty a œ̃ medikamɑ̃ puʁ lə mal də tɛt/
translations.en: You have medicine for a headache.
translations.es: Tienes un medicamento para el dolor de cabeza.
translations.de: Du hast ein Medikament gegen Kopfschmerzen.
translations.it: Hai una medicina per il mal di testa.
translations.ru: У тебя есть лекарство от головной боли.
translations.pt: Você tem remédio para dor de cabeça.
translations.vi: Bạn có thuốc trị đau đầu.
translations.nl: Je hebt een medicijn tegen hoofdpijn.
translations.uk: У тебе є ліки від головного болю.
translations.hi: तुम्हारे पास सिरदर्द की दवा है.
translations.id: Kamu punya obat untuk sakit kepala.
translations.ro: Ai un medicament pentru durerea de cap.
translations.ja: あなたは頭痛薬を持っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of 'as'.
Finite main verb (present, 2nd sg) expressing possession.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'médicament'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'as'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/benefit phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'mal'.
Common noun; head of the NP 'le mal de tête'.
Preposition marking a genitival complement specifying the type of 'mal'.
Common noun; complement of 'mal' via 'de', forming the compound 'mal de tête'.

sentences.target: Ils cherchent un médicament moins cher en ligne.
sentences.reading: /il ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ medikamɑ̃ mwɛ̃ ʃɛʁ ɑ̃ liɲ/

translations.fr: Ils cherchent un médicament moins cher en ligne.
translations.ipa: /il ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ medikamɑ̃ mwɛ̃ ʃɛʁ ɑ̃ liɲ/
translations.en: They’re looking for a cheaper medicine online.
translations.es: Están buscando un medicamento más barato en línea.
translations.de: Sie suchen online nach einem günstigeren Medikament.
translations.it: Stanno cercando online un farmaco più economico.
translations.ko: 그들은 온라인에서 더 싼 약을 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在网上找更便宜的药。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺網上搵更平嘅藥。
translations.ru: Они ищут в интернете более дешевое лекарство.
translations.pt: Eles estão procurando um remédio mais barato online.
translations.he: הם מחפשים באינטרנט תרופה זולה יותר.
translations.tr: İnternette daha ucuz bir ilaç arıyorlar.
translations.vi: Họ đang tìm một loại thuốc rẻ hơn trên mạng.
translations.ar: هم يبحثون على الإنترنت عن دواء أرخص.
translations.nl: Ze zoeken online naar een goedkoper medicijn.
translations.uk: Вони шукають в інтернеті дешевші ліки.
translations.hi: वे ऑनलाइन सस्ती दवा ढूंढ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Ψάχνουν στο διαδίκτυο για ένα φθηνότερο φάρμακο.
translations.nb: De leter på nettet etter en billigere medisin.
translations.id: Mereka sedang mencari obat yang lebih murah secara online.
translations.sv: De letar på nätet efter en billigare medicin.
translations.ro: Ei caută online un medicament mai ieftin.
translations.da: De søger på nettet efter en billigere medicin.
translations.ja: オンラインでより安い薬を探している。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural; subject of 'cherchent'.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd pl); takes 'un médicament' as its direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'médicament'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'cherchent'.
Adverb of degree modifying the adjective 'cher' (comparative: 'less expensive').
Adjective modifying 'médicament' within the NP ('un médicament moins cher').
Preposition introducing a locative PP ('en ligne' = 'online').
Common noun; object of the preposition 'en' forming the fixed expression 'en ligne'.

sentences.target: On a oublié le médicament à la maison.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a ublije lə medikamɑ̃ a la mɛzɔ̃/

translations.fr: On a oublié le médicament à la maison.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a ublije lə medikamɑ̃ a la mɛzɔ̃/
translations.en: We forgot the medicine at home.
translations.es: Se nos olvidó el medicamento en casa.
translations.de: Wir haben das Medikament zu Hause vergessen.
translations.it: Abbiamo dimenticato il medicinale a casa.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi quên thuốc ở nhà.
translations.nl: We zijn het medicijn thuis vergeten.
translations.hi: हम दवा घर पर भूल गए.

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun ('we/one'), subject of 'a'.
Auxiliary verb (present, 3rd sg) forming the passé composé with 'oublié'.
Past participle; main lexical verb in the compound tense 'a oublié'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for 'médicament'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'oublier'.
Preposition introducing a locative PP ('à la maison').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'maison'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'à'.
